steps.title: Identify the starting value
steps.content: At birth, $x=0$ days and the calf weighs $188$ pounds. This is the constant term in the model.

steps.title: Use the daily gain
steps.content: The calf gains $4$ pounds each day, so after $x$ days the gain is $4x$ pounds. The model is $$ y=188+4x $$ The answer is A.
